case_title: SAGAR GARUNG VS. CYBERNIB CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARUNG, SAGAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYBERNIB CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA DOLLARS & CENTS $30,698.31 PRINCIPAL, $174.17 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $31,322.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
